title: viguiera ovata
intro: Viguiera ovata, also known as yerba de la tormenta or desert marigold, is a flowering shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal effects. The health benefits associated with Viguiera ovata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat various ailments.
